diagnostics.title: Missing Block Header — Scope Corruption Risk
diagnostics.why_unsafe: A missing colon after if/for/while/def/class leaves the block header malformed. Code meant to be conditional or scoped may execute unconditionally at the outer level, silently bypassing guards and invariants.

top_fixes.description: Remove or correct the invalid operator combination.
Add ':' after the function definition header: def name():
Add ':' at the end of the block header statement.
